name: logit-lens-sweep
description: Find the layer at which a behaviour's prediction crystallises using a logit-lens sweep, then localise contributing heads.
question: At which layer does GPT-2 commit to predicting a year greater than the start year, and which components drive it?
references: Hanna et al. 2023, How does GPT-2 compute greater-than?
nostalgebraist 2020, interpreting GPT: the logit lens.
